/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_display_persistence.dir/display_persistence_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_persistence.dir/__/Apple2Display.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_persistence.dir/__/LeChatMauveCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_persistence.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_persistence.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_persistence.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_persistence.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_persistence.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_persistence.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_persistence.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_persistence.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_display_persistence  -ldl -lm
